'''Lindu Sencker''' was a [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] who headed the team that developed the [[Hyperspace Orbiting Scanner]], using the original proposal of [[Geothray Camber]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1989-10-XX -->''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'' {{1stm}}
*<!-- 1994-07-XX -->[[Imperial Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''Imperial Sourcebook'', Second Edition]]
